errors.invalidCredentials: Use any email and a password with at least 6 characters.

auth.description: Backed by a persisted Zustand store.
auth.title: Auth example

hero.description: This starter keeps the frontend intentionally small. Real apps can call generated hooks directly from routes or focused components, without a hand-written API wrapper in between.
hero.title: Simple route, local auth state, and room for generated API hooks.

pattern.description: Keep template examples boring, direct, and easy to replace.
pattern.firstParagraph: Put app-level state in <storePath>src/stores</storePath>, route UI in <routesPath>src/routes</routesPath>, and provider setup in <providersPath>src/providers.tsx</providersPath>.
pattern.secondParagraph: When a real API exists, keep <apiPath>src/lib/api</apiPath> for generated backend hooks and call those hooks from the route or component that owns the screen.
pattern.title: Use this pattern
